_comment: Mutation testing for the security-critical, PURE modules (entity/column authorization + rate-limit escalation/CIDR). Uses the command runner over `bun test` (the engine's runner isn't a Stryker plugin, but the command runner re-runs any test command per mutant). Scoped to fast, DB-free unit tests so a full run is a few minutes. Run: `bun run test:mutation` with the TEST_* env set (see CI).
